description: Local Python CLI worker for Czech government and tax filing automation. Work is being driven ad-hoc via /add-work (incremental task lifecycle, not upfront spec).
last_session_summary: Session 2: attempted full Phase 0 (spec + CLAUDE.md + task files); user reversed direction end-of-session. Pivoted to add-work lifecycle: spec, CLAUDE.md, and tasks/ deleted; 0.3, 0.4, 0.5, 0.6, 0.7, 0.8 marked superseded; Phase 1-5 task blocks marked superseded (kept for audit). 0.1, 0.1a, 0.2 remain complete (understanding work, no discarded deliverables).

phase_0_planning.name: Planning & Setup
phase_0_planning.description: Phase 0 REDEFINED: after Session 2, user directed project onto /add-work incremental lifecycle. Original upfront-spec flow (tasks 0.3-0.8) is superseded. Only understanding tasks (0.1, 0.1a, 0.2) remain useful. 0.9 (delete examples folder) is deferred pending user decision.

tasks.name: Read input materials and explore examples
tasks.verify: session_notes.md contains per-file summary of EVERY document in input/ with extracted requirements, constraints, and decisions

tasks.name: Confirm invoice data-source handling
tasks.added_reason: resources/ + dph-dap/ with real invoice data appeared during sessions 1 and 2; scope needed confirming.
tasks.verify: session_notes.md records invoice-handling decision (in scope / out of scope / deferred) with formats and role
tasks.verify_result: PASSED - TSVs in dph-dap/ understood; domain facts (DAP line numbers, KH sections, YYYY_Q period format, 21% VAT, CZK/EUR currencies) extracted. Note: broader spec using this data was later discarded by user directive.

tasks.name: Select playbook template and document rationale
tasks.verify_result: PASSED - rationale in session_notes.md. Note: under the new add-work lifecycle, template choice is informational only; no scaffolding was retained.

tasks.name: Draft IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md sections 1-3
tasks.superseded_reason: User retracted upfront-spec approach at end of Session 2 ('delete all you wrote. ad hoc tasks will be coming from me and we will formalise them one by one. just get on track add work lifecycle'). IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md file deleted.
tasks.verify: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md exists with Overview, Architecture, Technical Specs

tasks.name: Present spec to user and get approval
tasks.superseded_reason: No spec to approve under add-work lifecycle. The approval mechanism going forward is per-task via /add-work (user approves each proposed task individually).

tasks.name: Create project CLAUDE.md
tasks.superseded_reason: See 0.3. CLAUDE.md file deleted. Global ~/.claude instructions plus progress.json notes are sufficient for the add-work lifecycle.

tasks.name: Generate Phase 1 tasks
tasks.superseded_reason: See 0.3. tasks/ folder deleted. Future tasks added ad-hoc via /add-work.

tasks.name: Remove examples repo and commit Phase 0 completion
tasks.verify: syndicate-playbooks-examples/ removed, git log shows Phase 0 complete commit
tasks.notes: Deferred. User retracted the 'finish Phase 0 this session' directive; whether to delete the examples folder is no longer tied to an approval. Leave pending; user can trigger whenever.

phase_1_exploration_superseded.name: Setup & Exploration (SUPERSEDED)
phase_1_exploration_superseded.superseded_reason: Phase and all contained tasks were produced as part of superseded 0.7/0.8. Kept in file per append-only rule; do NOT treat as live work.

tasks.name: Add implementation tasks per confirmed scope

workflow: add-work lifecycle: user proposes each next task ad-hoc; /add-work registers it; /update-progress closes it. No upfront spec or phase plan.
